steps.title: Compare the simplified form to each option
steps.content:
Form I, $\frac{x^{14/3}y^{5/3}}{3}$, has different powers of $x$ and $y$ as well as a different constant — not equivalent to $\frac{3x^{15}y}{5}$.

Form II, $\frac{3x^{11}y^{2}}{5}$, has $x^{11}y^{2}$ instead of $x^{15}y$ — not equivalent.

Neither I nor II matches the simplified expression. That matches choice D — D is correct.
